arts.ttl: Bayern Munich boss Vincent Kompany talks dangers of condensed schedule, player rotation, and Jonas Urbig ahead of VfL Bochum tilt
arts.sum: Bayern Munich boss Vincent Kompany is clearly happy with how his team has played of late, but the manager knows that VfL Bochum has the capability of pulling off the upset — especially if the team starts to let their eyes wander ahead. There will be changes to Bayern Munich’s regular lineup for the VfL Bochum match, namely Jonas Urbig stepping in for Bayern Munich captain Manuel Neuer at goalkeeper.

arts.ttl: Report: Jonas Urbig earning rave reviews at Bayern Munich
arts.sum: According to a report from Bild (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ), Bayern Munich has been very impressed by the work of young goalkeeper Jonas Urbig. Urbig, of course, will be filling in for Manuel Neuer, as the captain nurses a calf injury:

arts.ttl: Can Xabi Alonso repeat the ‘miracle of Istanbul’ to overcome deficit against Bayern Munich?
arts.sum: As it so happens, Bayer Leverkusen manager Xabi Alonso was part of that Liverpool team, scoring the goal to equalize at 3-3. And now he is 3-0 down after the first leg of a Champions League match against Bayern Munich, which is essentially the half time of the tie.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Joshua Kimmich has made decision over his future as Arsenal, Man City and Liverpool contacted by his camp
arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively confirm that Arsenal, Manchester City and Liverpool have been contacted by Joshua Kimmich’s camp regarding the decision he has made over...

arts.ttl: Aleksandar Pavlović to miss Bayern Munich’s Bundesliga match vs. VfL Bochum
arts.sum: As expected, Bayern Munich midfielder Aleksandar Pavlović will miss Saturday’s match against VfL Bochum in the Bundesliga due to a lingering illness per FCBayern.com . Great, then check out our Bavarian Podcast Works — Preview Show on Patreon, Spotify, or below:

arts.ttl: Kingsley Coman plans to leave Bayern in summer, Sky reports
arts.sum: It appears as if Kingsley Coman will move on from the Allianz Arena in summer.

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen vs. Werder Bremen preview: Die Werkself looking for response after Bayern defeat
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen will look to bounce back from their heavy Champions League defeat to Bayern Munich when they welcome Werder Bremen to the BayArena for Saturday’s Bundesliga fixture.

arts.ttl: Weekend Warm-up: In the heat of squad planning, Bayern Munich’s Max Eberl trying to stay cool; Bundesliga predictions; Throwing it back to Jerry Cantrell; and MORE!
arts.sum: After recently inking Manuel Neuer, Jamal Musiala, Alphonso Davies and acquiring Jonas Urbig (arrived in January from FC Koln) and Tom Bischoff (arriving from Hoffenheim this summer), one might think that Eberl can step back and at least take a breath. Bavarian Podcast Works — Preview Show: Bayern Munich vs.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich and Joshua Kimmich in agreement for new deal through 2029
arts.sum: Kimmich never advanced in talks with any other club, only approaches — priority to FC Bayern. Joshua Kimmich and Bayern have exchanged all documents for new deal valid until June 2029.

arts.ttl: Bayern boss not ruling out new deal for Goretzka: "He took his chance"
arts.sum: Christoph Freund is full of praise for the way Leon Goretzka has fought his way back into the limelight for Bayern Munich.
